content.intro: Welcome to PropertyGoose! This guide will walk you through setting up your account and getting familiar with the platform. PropertyGoose helps self-managing landlords handle tenant offers, references, tenancies, agreements, and rent tracking all in one place.

steps.title: Register for an account
steps.content: Go to the registration page and enter your email address and create a password. Your password must be at least 6 characters long.

steps.title: Verify your email
steps.content: Check your inbox for a verification email from PropertyGoose. Click the link to verify your account.

steps.title: Complete onboarding
steps.content: After logging in for the first time, you'll be guided through the onboarding process. This includes setting up your details, adding bank information, and configuring your payment method.

sections.title: Understanding the Navigation
sections.content: The main navigation is located in the sidebar on the left. You'll find: Dashboard (your home screen with quick stats), Offers (send and manage tenant offer forms), Referencing (run tenant reference checks), Tenancies (manage active and draft tenancies — requires subscription), Properties (your property portfolio), Landlords (your companies and SPVs), Agreements (generate tenancy agreements), RentGoose (track rent payments and arrears), Settings (account preferences), and Help Centre (you're here!).

sections.title: Quick Create Menu
sections.content: Look for the '+' button in the header to quickly create a new Property or Agreement from anywhere in the app.

sections.title: Subscription Plans
sections.content: PropertyGoose offers three plans: PAYG (free, pay per reference), Standard (£11.99/month, up to 10 properties), and Professional (£24.99/month, unlimited properties). Offers are free on all plans. Tenancies and RentGoose require a subscription.
